Package g12.p2.cst438.g12_springboot

Class ExerciseController

java.lang.Object
g12.p2.cst438.g12_springboot.ExerciseController
@RestController public class ExerciseController extends Object

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Exercise>
    addExercise(Exercise exercise)
    POST endpoint to add a new Exercise.
    org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Void>
    deleteExercise(Exercise exercise)
    DELETE endpoint to remove an exercise from the DB.

    getAllExercises()
    GET endpoint to get all Exercises currently in the DB.

    getExerciseById(Long id)
    GET endpoint to retrieve a single Exercise by its ID.

    getExercisesByWorkoutId(Long workoutId)
    GET endpoint to retrieve Exercises by their associated Workout.
    org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Void>
    patchExerciseReps(Long id, int reps)
    PATCH endpoint to update only the number of reps for a given Exercise.
    org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Void>
    patchExerciseSets(Long id, int sets)
    PATCH endpoint to update only the number of sets for a given Exercise.

    updateExercise(Exercise exercise)
    PUT endpoint to fully update an Exercise.

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Method Details

    • getAllExercises

      @GetMapping("/getAllExercises") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<List<Exercise>> getAllExercises()
      GET endpoint to get all Exercises currently in the DB.
      Returns:
      Java List of all the Exercises in the DB, or a 404 if none currently present.

    • getExerciseById

      @GetMapping("/getExerciseById") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Exercise> getExerciseById(Long id)
      GET endpoint to retrieve a single Exercise by its ID.
      Parameters:
      id - ID of the exercise to retrieve.
      Returns:
      The Exercise with the given ID, or 404s if no such Exercise exists.

    • getExercisesByWorkoutId

      @GetMapping("/getExercisesByWorkoutId") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<List<Exercise>> getExercisesByWorkoutId(Long workoutId)
      GET endpoint to retrieve Exercises by their associated Workout.
      Parameters:
      workoutId - ID of the Workout to get Exercises for.
      Returns:
      Java List of Exercises associated with a given Workout, or a 404 if no such Exercises exist.

    • addExercise

      @PostMapping("/addExercise") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Exercise> addExercise(@RequestBody Exercise exercise)
      POST endpoint to add a new Exercise.
      Parameters:
      exercise - Exercise being added.
      Returns:
      Exercise object that was created.

    • updateExercise

      @PutMapping("/updateExercise") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Exercise> updateExercise(@RequestBody Exercise exercise)
      PUT endpoint to fully update an Exercise. 404s if no Exercise with that ID found.
      Parameters:
      exercise - Exercise object to update.
      Returns:
      Exercise object that was updated, or will 404 if no Exercise with that ID found.

    • patchExerciseReps

      @PatchMapping("/patchExercise/reps") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Void> patchExerciseReps(@RequestBody Long id, @RequestBody int reps)
      PATCH endpoint to update only the number of reps for a given Exercise.
      Parameters:
      id - ID of the exercise to update.
      reps - Number of reps to update the Exercise with.
      Returns:
      Empty HTTP 200 on success, 404s if no Exercise with that ID found.

    • patchExerciseSets

      @PatchMapping("/patchExercise/sets") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Void> patchExerciseSets(@RequestBody Long id, @RequestBody int sets)
      PATCH endpoint to update only the number of sets for a given Exercise.
      Parameters:
      id - ID of the Exercise to update.
      sets - Number of sets to update the Exercise with.
      Returns:
      Empty HTTP 200 on request, 404s if no Exercise with that ID found.

    • deleteExercise

      @DeleteMapping("/deleteExercise") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Void> deleteExercise(@RequestBody Exercise exercise)
      DELETE endpoint to remove an exercise from the DB.
      Parameters:
      exercise - Exercise to delete from the DB.
      Returns:
      HTTP 204 if success, HTTP 404 if no Exercise with that ID exists.
